name: Torralba d'en Salort
description: A Talayotic settlement (UNESCO) with the most monumental and perfectly preserved taula in Menorca, an Iron Age sanctuary, alongside two talayots, a hypostyle hall, rock-cut caves and a Cyclopean wall. Privately managed, with guided visits.

highlights: the most monumental and best-preserved taula in Menorca
walk the talayots and the hypostyle hall of the settlement (UNESCO)
pair it with a centre cheese dairy on the same day
